chapters.title: Last Ticket
chapters.content: Sophie bought the last ticket for the midnight train. She did not know exactly where she was going, but she knew she needed a new beginning.

chapters.title: Silent Passengers
chapters.content: The train was quiet. Most passengers were asleep, and only the sound of the wheels moving on the tracks filled the night.

chapters.title: A New City
chapters.content: At sunrise, Sophie arrived in a city she had never seen before. It felt strange, uncertain, and full of possibilities.
